items.title: Svajda wins on late father's birthday as five-set record smashed
items.summary: Zachary Svajda dedicates his French Open win to his late father, after making the fourth round for the first time - on what would have been his 61st birthday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Holden, De Caires fire Middlesex to first win of season
items.summary: Tymal Mills takes three but Sussex flounder in chase of 214 to be replaced at bottom of South Group
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Glasner considered for AC Milan job - Sunday's gossip
items.summary: Oliver Glasner considered for AC Milan job, while Liverpool negotiate with Inter Milan on a price for Curtis Jones, plus more.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
